title: dysoxylum dempoense
intro: Dysoxylum dempoense is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, commonly known as the Dempo ironwood or iron wood tree. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dysoxylum dempoense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Dysoxylum dempoense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including tinctures and decoctions.
